briefs.title: BC Casinos Must Track Where Players' Money Comes From, Starting April 2026
briefs.summary: Starting April 13, 2026, BC's gaming regulator will enforce a new Source of Funds Regulation under the Gaming Control Act. This rule sets out how casinos and gaming facilities must classify and track the money players use to buy into games — whether through cash, gaming accounts, or electronic devices — to help identify money laundering (using gambling to disguise illegally obtained money).
briefs.action_required: If you operate a BC gaming or casino business, review the Source of Funds Regulation and update your compliance procedures before April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Source of Funds Regulation (Gaming Control Act) takes effect
